summary: Tested the two new features (WebSocket realtime chat + 'Porta un amico' referral) plus regression. 18/18 pytest cases PASS including new ws-token auth gating, ws_token return shape, /users/me/referral, referrer_username flow on /auth/session, full referral-completion via auto-accept, $addToSet idempotency, and live WS broadcast across two connected sockets. Frontend: ref-banner on /?ref=, sessionStorage capture, referral card on /me, 'Prima volta insieme' badge visibility (shown when in referral_completed_with, hidden otherwise), and ChatDetail WS push (counterpart REST message appears without manual refresh).
critical_code_review_comments: WS auth via URL path param is correct workaround for k8s ingress stripping Authorization on Upgrade.
maybe_complete_referral uses $addToSet -> idempotent. Verified completed_with array stays length 1 after repeated triggers.
auth_session accepts referrer_username, normalizes lower-case, and guards self-referral (ref.user_id != user_id).

GET /api/auth/ws-token returns the session_token verbatim — fine here since the WS endpoint validates session via DB lookup; consider short-lived signed tokens for stronger isolation if WS scope grows.
server.py is now ~730 lines (was 670) — over the 700-line soft limit. Recommend splitting into routers (auth, users, conversations, ws) for next iteration.
ChatDetail correctly fetches /api/auth/ws-token then opens wss connection; previous polling removed.
test_credentials: MongoDB-seeded sessions per /app/memory/test_credentials.md (test_session_* / test-user-* / test-ui-*). Cleaned up in teardown.
seed_data_creation: Two ephemeral users (U referrer, V referred_by=U) inserted via mongosh for UI badge test; conv+messages cleaned up afterwards. Demo users used unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py now has 18 tests covering full MVP + new WS + referral flows. Use websockets.sync.client for WS frame assertions. Frontend selectors confirmed: data-testid='ref-banner','referral-link','referral-copy-btn','first-time-badge'. WS opens at wss://<host>/api/ws/<session_token>.
